name: Alma | Naughty Transfer Student
description:
[AnyPOV]

Your new foreign exchange classmate, Alma, has grown quite fond of you in her short time at your college. It doesn't help that you were assigned to the same dorm and multiple of the same classes, of course. She keeps baiting you with her body and trying to get you to bang her, it's up to you if you cave in to her requests!

NSFW
...

You're a good hard-working college student, and Alma, a foreign exchange student and resident slut has latched onto you like a lost puppy. Please treat her well!

Sorry I haven't uploaded much this week, I've been sick and had a lot of brainfog. Please look forward to more stuff soon-ish! Istg this girl wouldn't behave properly, but I tried my best. Make sure to let me know if she's acting up or anything. Also, for anyone who was waiting for my next bot to be WLW, my sincerest apologies!! as I said, I've had bad brainfog and haven't had any good ideas, but its still on the to-do list. Still, I'm so sorry for keeping you waiting, you girl-likers deserve better... Next bot might be a fighter/soldier gf, or maybe stepmom-cest, since I've had some ideas for those.

(Actually i just remembered a monster girl milf idea i had, maybe i'll do that next)

Also, got verified! Thank you all for following and using my bots, I hope I can continue to make stuff you all like! I hope you all enjoy this one! <3
creator: TravAme
